chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI High Court Appeal Nos. 62 & 61 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case. 1) For orders on office objection a/w reply at “A”. 2) For hearing of main case. 3) For orders on CMA No. 444/25 (stay) 4) For orders on CMA No. 445/25 (U/S 5 of limitation) -------------- 20.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Nauman Jamali, Advocate for the Appellants in HCA No. 62 of 2025. Mr. Zahid Hussain, Advocate for the Appellant in HCA No. 61 of 2025. ************ After being confronted as to involvement of limitation in HCA No. 62 of 2025 and any illegality in the impugned order, both learned Counsel, under instructions, do not press these Appeals along with pending application(s). Ordered accordingly. Office to place copy of this order in the connected cases. ACTING CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz
